cohort_patterns.summary: Bounded single-role route that keeps handoff triggers explicit instead of mythologizing autonomy.
activation_conditions: no mandatory multi-role review before the next step
required_handoffs: hand off on ambiguity when the route exceeds the role contract
hand off durable memory shaping to memory-keeper
hand off high-cost arbitration to deep or evaluator
cohort_patterns.boundary_note: Solo is a bounded default, not permission for one role to silently absorb planning, review, and memory canon.

cohort_patterns.summary: Dual-role collaboration that keeps design pressure and review posture explicit without hidden orchestration.
activation_conditions: bounded implementation with an explicit review edge
need for a second role before escalation becomes necessary
required_handoffs: hand off to reviewer when execution risk rises
hand off to architect when boundary-shaping decisions appear
hand off durable provenance or recall design to memory-keeper
cohort_patterns.boundary_note: Pair keeps dual-role coordination inspectable and does not become hidden orchestration or an implicit playbook.

cohort_patterns.summary: Governed self-agent cohort for system-shaping routes that need approval, rollback, health, and provenance posture.
activation_conditions: approval, rollback, or health posture must be explicit
provenance and improvement logging must remain reviewable
required_handoffs: architect names constitutional fit and scope before the change
coder executes only after approval is explicit
reviewer checks post-change health and final boundedness
memory-keeper preserves provenance and the improvement log
cohort_patterns.boundary_note: Checkpoint_cohort names the governed actor cohort, not the runtime implementation that executes the route.

cohort_patterns.summary: Multi-step coordination hint for routes that need explicit transitions, escalation posture, and possible distillation.
activation_conditions: escalation or arbitration may be needed
required_handoffs: transition decisions stay explicit through conductor-facing surfaces
deep activates only for named high-cost conditions
archivist distills durable candidates without replacing source-owned canon
cohort_patterns.boundary_note: Orchestrated_loop is a coordination hint over the public loop and does not absorb scenario composition from aoa-playbooks.
